title: Blaze Attack Animation
description: A simple datapack that gives blazes a fancier attack animation.
body:
This datapack simply gives blazes a new animation when shooting their fireballs.

It now summons them from the side, then top, then side, one by one, then shooting them at the player.

Note: This feature came from my mod [Mob AI Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mob-ai-tweaks). Also, the one from said mod is better than this datapack recreation of it. This was just made for fun as I wanted to play around with display entities.

(Ps, sorry for scuffed recording lol, recording software tends to tweak when using a pure vanilla Minecraft client)

Check out my other datapacks:

[Rapiers (1.21.11+)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/rapiers-datapack)

[Mobility Enchants (1.21.4-1.21.11)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/mobility-enchants)
